evals.prompt: I want to start a new project called 'fintracker'. I'm building a REST API in Python using FastAPI — it's a personal finance tracker that stores transaction data in PostgreSQL. I'll be containerizing it with Docker.
evals.expected_output: Technical project scaffolded with src/, artifacts/, docs/ structure. CLAUDE.md at root with FastAPI/PostgreSQL context and a Commands section. Step 3 recommends postgres and/or github MCP servers. Docker setup offered. Questions gathered in a single message before files created.
assertions: CLAUDE.md was created at the project root
CLAUDE.md contains the project name 'fintracker'
CLAUDE.md has a '## Commands' section
CLAUDE.md mentions FastAPI or Python in the tech stack or commands section
The directory structure includes a src/ directory
The directory structure includes docs/tasks/ or docs/tasks/active/
CLAUDE.md contains a '## Recommended tooling' section
At least one database-related MCP (postgres, sqlite) or github MCP was recommended

evals.prompt: can you set up a research project for me? call it 'llm-assistant-analysis'. i'm doing a competitive analysis of LLM coding assistants (cursor, github copilot, cody, etc) for a report i'm writing for my team lead. want to track sources and have a proper output doc at the end
evals.expected_output: Research project scaffolded with sources/, notes/, outputs/, docs/ structure. CLAUDE.md tailored to competitive analysis with a Research approach section. Step 3 recommends search MCPs (brave-search, tavily, or exa). First task offered around scoping the research.
assertions: CLAUDE.md was created at the project root
CLAUDE.md contains the project name 'llm-assistant-analysis'
CLAUDE.md has a '## Research approach' section
CLAUDE.md's Research approach section mentions competitive analysis, LLM tools, or coding assistants
The directory structure includes a sources/ directory
The directory structure includes a notes/ directory
The directory structure includes an outputs/ directory
No src/ directory was created (this is not a technical project)
CLAUDE.md contains a '## Recommended tooling' section
At least one web search MCP (brave-search, tavily, exa, or fetch) was recommended

evals.prompt: start a new project for me, let's call it 'home-reno'. I'm planning and tracking my home renovation — need to keep track of tasks, contractor quotes, material costs, and a rough timeline. not really coding, more just organized notes and lists
evals.expected_output: Correctly identified as 'other'/research type. Research structure created (sources/, notes/, outputs/, docs/). CLAUDE.md useful for planning/tracking. No TDD scaffolding or tech-specific files. Tooling suggestions lightweight and relevant.
assertions: CLAUDE.md was created at the project root
CLAUDE.md contains the project name 'home-reno'
The project was NOT classified as technical — no src/ directory was created
No test-specs directory was created (test-spec scaffolding is for technical projects only)
The directory structure includes docs/tasks/ or equivalent task tracking
CLAUDE.md contains a '## Recommended tooling' section
No heavy developer tools were recommended (postgres, puppeteer, code-scanner, reverse-engineer)
